narrative:
Granville Twp township has 7,614 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a clear Republican lean of 7.4 percentage points.
